description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with two main rectangular volumes joined together, each topped with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wood paneling, giving it a warm, contemporary appearance. Large, rectangular windows are prominently placed on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure sits low to the ground, consistent with typical bungalow proportions, and lacks any visible porch or veranda. The rooflines intersect in a dynamic, geometric pattern, enhancing the modern aesthetic. The overall look is clean, minimalistic, and well-suited for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, wood-paneled bungalow with intersecting hip roofs and large rectangular windows, featuring a clean and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the bungalow are visible, showing the intersecting rooflines and a pair of large windows on the side facade.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front and side, showcasing the main entrance area and the prominent front-facing windows.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back and side facades, with wood paneling and a large window on the rear volume.
description_view_3: The front and angled side are visible, emphasizing the main windows and the dynamic roof geometry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
